'''kaduvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherlet|featherlet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherlet|featherlet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kaduvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædivith|kædivith]] || [[word:kædivij|kædivij]] || [[word:kædivish|kædivish]] || [[word:kædivi|kædivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kaduduvuth|kaduduvuth]] || [[word:kaduduvuj|kaduduvuj]] || [[word:kaduduvush|kaduduvush]] || [[word:kaduduvu|kaduduvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kaduvuth|kaduvuth]] || [[word:kaduvuj|kaduvuj]] || [[word:kaduvush|kaduvush]] || [[word:kaduvu|kaduvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadufvuth|kadufvuth]] || [[word:kadufvuj|kadufvuj]] || [[word:kadufvush|kadufvush]] || [[word:kadufvuf|kadufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kaduvuthu|kaduvuthu]] || [[word:kaduvuju|kaduvuju]] || [[word:kaduvushu|kaduvushu]] || [[word:kaduvuku|kaduvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kaduvuth|kaduvuth]] || [[word:kaduvuj|kaduvuj]] || [[word:kaduvush|kaduvush]] || [[word:kaduvu|kaduvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kaduvuthul|kaduvuthul]] || [[word:kaduvujul|kaduvujul]] || [[word:kaduvushul|kaduvushul]] || [[word:kaduvukul|kaduvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kaduvuthuthu|kaduvuthuthu]] || [[word:kaduvujuju|kaduvujuju]] || [[word:kaduvushushu|kaduvushushu]] || [[word:kaduvuku|kaduvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kaduvuthun|kaduvuthun]] || [[word:kaduvujun|kaduvujun]] || [[word:kaduvushun|kaduvushun]] || [[word:kaduvukun|kaduvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kaduvuthuoro|kaduvuthuoro]] || [[word:kaduvujuoro|kaduvujuoro]] || [[word:kaduvushuoro|kaduvushuoro]] || [[word:kaduvukuoro|kaduvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
